text: @jimmend7361  Grazie, amico!
author: @JClayton1994

text: @JClayton1994  Prego bro! I don't know how good your italian is but there are some really good quality YTP in italian too. You can check out "Questa poop ha un'aura potentissima" or "La vera storia di Harry Potter"
author: @jimmend7361

text: @jimmend7361  I'll check them out! I saw that you commented on my Florence video but your comment has disappeared so I could not respond.
author: @JClayton1994

text: @JClayton1994  ah, i was just telling you that it was unfortunate that you lost your wallet but in Italy very often we have pickpocketers. Many are gypsies but i didn't want to come off as racist saying that... maybe i got reported?
author: @jimmend7361

text: @jimmend7361  Ahh ok, maybe, who knows... can't say anything these days.
author: @JClayton1994

text: @JClayton1994  actually sorry about that comment, it probably made me sound like a douche. I usually try to warn people who want to visit my country so that they won't lose their belongings; Purely out of desire that they will have a good experience in my country ^^ hope that in your next trip to Italy you won't have any inconvenience! Did you like Florence? Have you visited other cities too?
author: @jimmend7361

text: @jimmend7361  nah you're cool :) Nessun problema!
author: @JClayton1994
